---
title: "Soins palliatifs"
---

## Palliaguide {#palliaguide .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="palliaguide">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.palliaguide.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/palliaguide.png" alt="Palliaguide">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.palliaguide.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Palliaguide</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Réseau de soins palliatifs
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
